name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: our final challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend - from the start I wanted to run a grassroots campaign that engaged Marylanders in a discussion of issues and ideas critical to the future of our state and country -- And that's what we have done.

Tomorrow is election day and, thanks to your help and support, we have done our utmost best to make sure that Democrats know what the stakes are in this election.

Now it's critical to ensure that people turnout to exercise their right to vote before the official close of this primary campaign at 8 pm tomorrow night. **[I hope with your help we'll be able to get as many voters as possible to the polls.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d3d/70cdc2ba/47e54d87/396c32f/2662971276/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/superpacfinalstretch_cvh?refcode=em42516_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+with+your+help+well+be+able+to+ge&utm_campaign=em42516_2&source=em42516_2")**

My final ask is that before you go to bed tonight you send a personal email to all your family, friends and colleagues to go vote Van Hollen for Senate tomorrow.

It is my hope that together we WILL be an important force in advancing real solutions to our nation's challenges in a Democratic led U.S. Senate next year!

Thank you for everything,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Today it's your turn to vote
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I've said it since day one: I can't do this alone. This campaign is about creating a political revolution -- millions of people standing up to transform our country economically, politically, socially and environmentally.
This is a people's campaign, and **the single most important thing you can dotoday is get to your polling location.**
**[FIND YOUR
POLLING LOCATION »](https://vote.berniesanders.com/MD "https://vote.berniesanders.com/MD")** **[Click here to find your polling place»](https://vote.berniesanders.com/MD "https://vote.berniesanders.com/MD")**
By voting today you will send a message, loudly and clearly, that this country belongs to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires.
This campaign isn't about me. This campaign is about us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). name: Corry Bliss
subject: Do you know what happened in 1976?
body:
| Peter -- Do you know what happened in 1976? That's when Ted Strickland first starting running for Congress!

Last week, Ted bragged about how he first starting running for Congress in the 1970s. Today, we're releasing our latest web ad, "DC Insider," detailing Ted's 40 years as a DC insider. It begins running online across Ohio today.

[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DAXplCgZuwYo&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=insider_blast&n=1)
After being booted from the governor’s mansion, Ted Strickland formed a lobbying company, moved to D.C., and then proceeded to turn his back on Ohio and lobby for an anti-gun, anti-coal, pro-tax, pro-Obamacare liberal special interest group. Ted Strickland is everything that is wrong with Washington.

What is worse is that Ted has spent 40 years as a DC insider but he's accomplished nothing. Literally nothing. While in the Senate, Rob has passed nearly 50 bills into law, but Ted Strickland didn't pass a single bill into law despite being in Congress for 12 years. He was even named one of the most ineffective and absent members of Congress!

On his watch as governor, Ohio lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. With a record like that, we know Ohio simply can't afford a return to Retread Ted's Ohio.

Please [watch our ad today](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DAXplCgZuwYo&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=insider_blast&n=2) and forward it to five of your friends! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=insider_blast&n=3) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=insider_blast&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=insider_blast&n=5)

---

body:
Why we're going to win: | Friend --

We talk a lot about how we’re going to win (by fighting for every last vote, of course, including in the five states voting today!), but right now, I want to talk about _why_ we’re going to win:

We’re going to win because this team is working hard to bring people together so we can all succeed -- regardless of race, religion, or what ZIP code you live in.

While other candidates say we should build walls to keep people out, this team is fighting to break down the barriers that hold people back.

And as other candidates spew divisive, hateful rhetoric, we’re committed to building a more equitable future for all Americans.

I’m proud to stand by your side today and every day, and I’m so grateful for everything you’ve done to help make our team the biggest and strongest in this election. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, but because of you, I know we can win.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/156126373356765184/5721564941341687808?refcode=e20160426&refcode2=e20160426&amount=25)
---
We did it, friend!

Over the past nine months, we worked together to build our grassroots campaign from the ground up.

Our volunteers pounded the pavement to talk to voters, our staff put in long hours and late nights, and we fought for every last vote. Our grassroots donors chipped in $5 here and $10 there to make sure we had the resources to compete. And your hard work paid off, big time.

I'm proud to be Pennsylvania's Democratic nominee to take on -- and beat -- Pat Toomey this November. Pennsylvanians deserve a champion who will fight on behalf of families to make college more affordable, to raise the minimum wage, and to make sure that all Americans have access to affordable health care.

Friend, we've got a long, hard road ahead -- but our victory today proves that this grassroots team has what it takes to pull together and win.

I'll be calling on you for your support soon enough. But right now, I just want to say thank you. I mean it when I say I couldn't have done this without you.

Thank you for everything,

Katie
